title: セントライト記念の後に・昇竜と伏龍

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black sails straight through the St. Lite
Kinen. There was absolutely no need to be
concerned about the race's distance after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond also stops by and informs her
that she will soon make her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Kikuka Sho, but her greatest rival,
Brusquement, will not be running in it because she
has to undergo minor surgery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Kitasan Black's main source of
motivation is gone. Unfortunately, race day is
coming up fast.
